violations.text: Menu board and/or order station does not have an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Per interview of staff, slicers are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Cheese was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Cheese was observed over stacked in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed over stacked cheese in another pan for proper cold holding. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Inspector observed dishwashing staff (employed by facility management) drying dishes with a cloth. Facility management notified. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
